name: Facewear
description: Even Realities G1/G2 whole-headset pairing, display text, microphone audio, side-tap mic control, bridge Wi-Fi setup, and diagnostics.

FACEWEAR_SMARTGLASSES_TRANSPORT.label: Smartglasses Transport
FACEWEAR_SMARTGLASSES_TRANSPORT.help: Preferred Even Realities transport: auto, even-bridge, web-bluetooth, or noble.

options.label: Auto
options.description: Use an injected transport, native bridge, Web Bluetooth, then Noble in order.

options.label: Native Bridge
options.description: Use an iOS, Android, desktop, EvenHub, or Mentra bridge exposed by the host.

options.label: Web Bluetooth
options.description: Use browser BLE pairing for direct G1 access.

options.label: Noble BLE
options.description: Use Node/Bun BLE through the optional Noble transport.

FACEWEAR_SCAN_TIMEOUT_MS.label: Scan Timeout
FACEWEAR_SCAN_TIMEOUT_MS.help: BLE scan timeout in milliseconds for Noble-based direct G1 connections.

FACEWEAR_AUTO_INIT.label: Auto Init
FACEWEAR_AUTO_INIT.help: Send G1 connection-ready init packets after connecting.

FACEWEAR_INIT_MODE.label: Init Mode
FACEWEAR_INIT_MODE.help: Connection-ready init mode: lens-specific, official same-init, or Android F4 same-init.

options.label: Lens Specific
options.description: Send 0x4D 0x01 to the left lens and 0xF4 0x01 to the right lens.

options.label: iOS Same Init
options.description: Send 0x4D 0x01 to both lenses, matching EvenDemoApp iOS.

options.label: Android F4 Same Init
options.description: Send 0xF4 0x01 to both lenses, matching EvenDemoApp Android.
